title: bromus racemosus subsp. commutatus
intro: Bromus racemosus subsp. commutatus, commonly known as false brome or short-spike false brome, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high content of essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bromus racemosus subsp. commutatus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal disorders.
